title: Tortoise and the Hare (The Finish)
summary: The race's final stretch, voiced with balanced storytelling energy.
prompt: The hare opened his eyes with a start. The sun was low in the sky. He had slept for hours! He sprang from the grass and raced down the road as fast as his long legs would carry him. But it was too late. There, just ahead at the finish line, the slow and steady tortoise was taking his final step. And the moral of the story is this: slow and steady wins the race.
